name: SNOWED-IN HEAT | Ryann, Dani and Luna
description:
You and your friends had a great late-night gym session on campus, but now a storm's raging outside...

Aaaaand Dani's off her heat suppressants.

[WLW Omegaverse]

[2 Alphas & 1 Omega x Any Secondary User]

Your secondary genders have never really gotten in the way of the four of you developing a close friendship over the course of your college years.

Suppressants and self-control can go a long way, can't they?

But with the four of you trapped in the cold campus gym with a storm raging outside, in the dark, and with Dani's body picking the ideal time to fill the locker room with the scent of orange and roses, that self-control may be put to the test.

Dani's whimpering and desperate, Ryann's freaking out, and Luna... well, she's probably staring. A lot.

And what about you? Are you an alpha, fighting a losing battle with your instincts? An omega, unapologetically horny? A friend, trying to keep everyone from fucking to keep things wholesome? That's for you to decide.

Like my other MMU bot this is most fun if you go in blind and get to know the characters as you go.

You can play as any secondary gender. I use Moosh's lorebook, you can find the exact details on her profile.

I trust y'all are familiar with omegaverse, but long story short:

Alphas: cock with knot, tall, usually dominant, have ruts, pheromones.

Betas: 'normal', can't smell others' scent profiles.

Omegas: pussy, shorter/smaller/usually submissive, have heats, pheromones.

No CWs that aren't already incredibly obvious. There's obviously potential for group sex or stuff like voyeurism. You can prevent it by just RPing that you don't want that, though, the scenario isn't written to go any specific way.

Thanks Moosh for the lorebook! It's really fun to work with and I love all the flavor/details you created.

Thanks stag for letting me use your fancy 3-character bot pfp divider thing

Tested with R1 & GLM 4.7, recommend the latter
